themes.name: ServerKit
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: The stock ServerKit look — deep slate surfaces with a periwinkle accent.

themes.name: Apamate
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: Muted rose dark with soft gold highlights, after the pink-flowering apamate tree.

themes.name: Araguaney
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: Amber terminal glow on near-black — the national tree in full yellow bloom, CRT style.

themes.name: Azulejo
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: Navy depths with the soft blue of the azulejo tanager as the accent.

themes.name: Cacao
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: Chocolate-warm dark with soft pastel accents — criollo cacao in theme form.

themes.name: Ceiba
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: Earthy jungle greens under the canopy of the great ceiba tree.

themes.name: Gruvbox
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: A warm retro terminal palette with earthy browns and an orange accent.

themes.name: Guacamaya
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: Indigo night with the scarlet, gold and blue of the macaws that fly over at sunset.

themes.name: High Contrast
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: A maximum-contrast theme tuned for accessibility, in dark and light.

themes.name: Nord Deep
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: A deep arctic dark theme with cool blue surfaces and frosty accents.

themes.name: Onoto
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: Warm annatto red-orange in both modes — a full dark and light pair, like the kitchen staple.

themes.name: Orquídea
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: A deep violet dark theme in the lilac of the national flower, the Cattleya orchid.

themes.name: Papelón
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: A warm sepia light theme in cane-sugar cream and terracotta — papelón con limón.

themes.name: Paper
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: A clean, bright light theme with crisp white surfaces and a blue accent.

themes.name: Phosphor
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: A near-black OLED theme with glowing terminal-green text.

themes.name: Tepuy
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: Stark grayscale on black stone with a single red accent — hard edges, tight radius.

themes.name: Turpial
themes.author: serverkit
themes.description: Deep black warmed by the vivid orange of Venezuela's national bird.
